title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Liberty Shoes

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Liberty Shoes
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Liberty Shoes! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Liberty Shoes:
Liberty Shoes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liberty Shoes!
